form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Only had one start last preparation didn't finish the race at this track September 23 over 2800m. When resuming last campaign 2nd of 11 at Wolverhampton on July 1 2024 over 2450m, 1.5 len behind Goblet Of Fire carrying 62kg at $6.50. Prefer to see him go around again before recommending.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 4th in a small field at this track on March 10 over 2200m, 7 len behind Caliban carrying 58kg at $19.
